meta.primaryGoal: Define the app surface area screen by screen, including purpose, users, components, actions, states, and navigation relationships.

screen.name: Splash / Launch
screen.purpose: Brand entry and session bootstrap.

screen.name: Welcome / Entry
screen.purpose: Entry point to sign up, log in, or browse limited public surfaces.

screen.name: Create Account
screen.purpose: Register new users and begin role routing.

screen.name: Log In
screen.purpose: Authenticate returning users.

screen.name: Role Selection
screen.purpose: Select primary user identity and customize onboarding path.

screen.name: Barista Onboarding
screen.purpose: Capture profile basics needed to enter contests and build public identity.

screen.name: Judge Onboarding
screen.purpose: Capture credentials, category expertise, and verification inputs for judges.

screen.name: Host / Cafe Onboarding
screen.purpose: Set up organizations that want to run contests or discover talent.

screen.name: Sponsor Onboarding
screen.purpose: Set up brand identity and campaign goals for sponsors.

screen.name: Home Feed
screen.purpose: Main discovery surface for contests, entries, battles, and spotlight content.

components.component: Top nav with search and notifications

screen.name: Contest Index
screen.purpose: Browse all contests by status, format, region, and category.

screen.name: Contest Detail
screen.purpose: Show rules, timeline, prizes, host, judging format, and entry CTA.

screen.name: Contest Rules / Scoring Fullscreen
screen.purpose: Deep-dive explainer for contest criteria and scoring weights.

screen.name: Battle Viewer
screen.purpose: Head-to-head contest comparison optimized for quick voting.

components.component: Blind judging mask toggle if enabled

screen.name: Submission Detail
screen.purpose: Detailed view of a single entry with media, metadata, scores, and comments.

screen.name: Contest Results
screen.purpose: Display winners, placements, score summary, and public recap.

screen.name: Search
screen.purpose: Cross-app search for baristas, contests, hosts, sponsors, and content.

screen.name: Notifications Center
screen.purpose: Central inbox for contest alerts, follows, ranks, votes, and opportunities.

screen.name: Create / Submit Entry Hub
screen.purpose: Single entry point for submission workflows and creation-related tools.

screen.name: Submission Setup
screen.purpose: Select contest and review submission requirements before recording or upload.

screen.name: In-App Camera / Recording
screen.purpose: Capture standardized contest media natively in the app.

screen.name: Media Upload
screen.purpose: Import contest media from device library or web upload.

screen.name: Submission Review and Metadata
screen.purpose: Finalize clip, add metadata, and confirm compliance before submission.

screen.name: Submission Drafts
screen.purpose: Manage incomplete or editable draft submissions.

screen.name: Submission Confirmation / Tracking
screen.purpose: Confirm submission and allow the barista to track review, judging, and results.

screen.name: Public Barista Profile
screen.purpose: Public identity, portfolio, stats, contest history, and reputation surface.

screen.name: Leaderboard Home
screen.purpose: Entry point into rankings by overall, category, region, and timeframe.

screen.name: Ranking Detail
screen.purpose: Explain a user's rank and the inputs that shape it.

screen.name: Achievements and Badges
screen.purpose: Display verified milestones, wins, and platform-recognized performance markers.

screen.name: Region Explorer
screen.purpose: Let users discover top baristas, contests, and hosts by geography.

screen.name: Following Feed
screen.purpose: Personalized content stream limited to followed baristas, contests, and hosts.

screen.name: Spotlight / Editorial
screen.purpose: Curated content for standout talent, themes, and community narratives.

screen.name: Live Event Companion
screen.purpose: Sync physical throwdowns and real-time audience interaction inside the app.

screen.name: My Profile Dashboard
screen.purpose: Owner view of barista profile with edit tools and private metrics.

screen.name: Edit Profile
screen.purpose: Update public identity, bio, links, and visibility settings.

screen.name: My Contest History
screen.purpose: Private chronological history of all user participation and outcomes.

screen.name: Private Analytics
screen.purpose: Give users performance insights beyond public profile data.

screen.name: Opportunities Home
screen.purpose: Central place for jobs, invitations, sponsorships, and inbound requests.

components.component: Tabs for jobs, invites, sponsorships, collaborations

screen.name: Opportunity Detail
screen.purpose: Detailed view of a job, sponsorship, or invitation request.

screen.name: Message / Contact Thread
screen.purpose: Structured communication for accepted or active opportunity conversations.

screen.name: Create Opportunity Request
screen.purpose: Allow hosts or sponsors to send structured outreach to a barista.

screen.name: Judge Dashboard
screen.purpose: Overview of assigned contests, pending scorecards, and judge status.

screen.name: Judge Scoring Queue
screen.purpose: Manage assigned submissions waiting for scorecards.

screen.name: Judge Scorecard
screen.purpose: Evaluate a submission against structured criteria.

screen.name: Judge Submission Confirmation
screen.purpose: Confirm submitted scorecard and move to next assignment.

screen.name: Judge Profile / Credibility
screen.purpose: Public-facing judge credibility surface showing role, expertise, and history.

screen.name: Host Dashboard
screen.purpose: Operational hub for cafes, organizers, and sponsors running contests.

screen.name: Contest Creation Wizard
screen.purpose: Step-by-step workflow for creating a new contest.

screen.name: Contest Management
screen.purpose: Manage a single contest after draft or publication.

screen.name: Submission Review Queue
screen.purpose: Moderate incoming entries before they go live or into judging.

screen.name: Judge Assignment
screen.purpose: Assign judges to contests or rounds and manage conflicts.

screen.name: Result Publication
screen.purpose: Finalize placements and push contest results public.

screen.name: Host Analytics
screen.purpose: Measure contest performance, engagement, and sponsor outcomes.

screen.name: Filters / Sort Modal
screen.purpose: Universal filtering system used by feed, contests, and leaderboards.

screen.name: Settings
screen.purpose: Account-level controls and preferences.

screen.name: Notification Preferences
screen.purpose: Control what alerts users receive and where.

screen.name: Privacy and Visibility
screen.purpose: Configure profile visibility, discoverability, and contact permissions.

screen.name: Verification Center
screen.purpose: Manage identity, role, and credential verification.

screen.name: Admin Dashboard
screen.purpose: Global system oversight for moderators and platform operators.

screen.name: User Moderation Queue
screen.purpose: Review reported users and enforce platform policy.

screen.name: Content / Submission Moderation Queue
screen.purpose: Review flagged content, suspected plagiarism, or policy violations.

screen.name: Vote Integrity / Fraud Review
screen.purpose: Investigate brigading, suspicious activity, and score manipulation attempts.

screen.name: Error / Empty / Edge States Library
screen.purpose: Shared system state definitions for UX consistency.

notes.note: The critical retention loop is S10 -> S12 -> S19/S20 -> S23 -> S25 -> S26 -> S27.
The critical viral loop is S10 -> S14 -> S15 -> S26 -> share externally -> return.
The critical monetization loop is S47 -> S48 -> S49 -> S53.
